description_long: This is a dance arcade game cabinet, reminiscent of popular rhythm games like Dance Dance Revolution. The cabinet features a large, upright console with a prominent display screen, currently showing an 'OUT OF ORDER' sign taped to it. Below the screen are two large speakers and a control panel, while the main play area consists of a raised dance platform with nine illuminated arrow panels arranged in a grid, colored in pink and blue. Two sturdy metal handrails are mounted at the rear of the dance platform for player support. The cabinet is primarily constructed from metal and plastic, with a glossy finish and vibrant, arcade-themed artwork on the marquee. The overall design is robust and built to withstand heavy use in public urban environments such as arcades, malls, or entertainment centers.
description: A dance arcade game cabinet with a large screen, illuminated dance platform, and metal handrails, featuring vibrant arcade artwork and an 'OUT OF ORDER' sign.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with an 'OUT OF ORDER' sign, control panel, speakers, and the full dance platform with colored arrow panels and handrails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinet, the thickness of the dance platform, and the profile of the handrails and screen.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the cabinet, which is plain and boxy with no visible controls or artwork.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the dance platform, handrails, and the side profile of the cabinet and screen.
attribute_screen_type: CRT or LCD, flat, medium size with a thick bezel and arcade-themed frame
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of controls, each with a start button and possible arrow buttons, arranged for two players side-by-side; color scheme matches the dance pads
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, with vibrant purple and blue colors, stylized text, and an energetic arcade theme
